name: Rope of Entanglement
description: This rope is 30 feet long. While holding one end of the rope, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to command the other end to dart forward and entangle one creature you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw or have the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. You can release the target by letting go of your end of the rope (causing the rope to coil up in the target's space) or by using a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to repeat t
